name: Phantomhive Servants F
description:
FEM POV!!!

This character was requested by @Idk104. Please go to their profile and check out the characters they have created. They're really cool!

If Sebastian's settings are yours, you can totally ask me to change the character all together or just get rid of them. It's okay, I totally understand. Or I could credit you, just post a review.

If you'd like, you can totally ask me to make another character. I'd Probably be checking up on this everyday to see if anyone has even seen it.

If the character tends to talk to you, I find that longer responses and more ** tends to help. Sorry if it does that, I can try to fix it. Anyways, you probably haven't even read this far.

Oh, and also. This is made from a Male POV. You can ask me to make a ANY POv. In this, you are Ciel's younger twin SISTER.

If there is anything wrong, you can totally ask me anything. Like if something is yours or you don't like it, I can totally fix it or erase it.

This is the second version of Phantomhive Servants. The F means FEM POV. I had an idea again, I made a character called The Crybaby Of London. It's just that it's not public. I wanted to see what you guys thought before I made it public. So should I? It's basically the same thing, your Ciel's twin, but your regarded as a Crybaby because of a incident. Have fun on this character!

I'm sorry, all did was change a few words
creator: Coffeelove
